title: Strategy Auditor Role Work
summary: Reusable wrkstrm-finance workstream template for strategy risk audit and governance exception work.
instructions: Use this template when instantiating concrete Strategy Auditor work.
Bind audit outputs to current journal, broker, and market inputs.
Do not treat this reusable template as evidence that a live strategy audit happened.
outcomes: Risk dashboards and audit views are repeatable.
Drift, sleeve risk, and governance exceptions have source-backed evidence.

tasks.text: Compute Delta skew and vega/theta equilibrium across open strategies.
Flag convexity risk hot spots and produce Notion audit entries.
Automated governance trend reporting with exception feeds to Patch.
Add vanna/volga approximations; stress testing scenarios.
Define sleeve risk metrics and alert thresholds.
Implement exposure dashboards and PDF audits.
